summary: Phase 2 frontend-only verification of MAGNAURA site. All 10 review checkpoints verified via Playwright on desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844). No console/page errors detected. All required data-testids present and interactive. Home page hero split, Reserve a Table button, 3 premium founder cards, ONLY 'All' + 'Chef Special' menu filters, all 5 spot-checked PDF menu items with correct 'Rs.' prices and section labels, Mag'Rolls brand using authentic /assets/brands/mag-rolls.jpg, Gallery page with 4 sections/masonry/lazy loading/hero video and download CTA all pass.

issues: The absolutely-positioned Reserve a Table button (top:108px) overlaps the 'Contact The Corporate Office' heading in the Contact section when scrolled to top of that section. Consider adjusting z-order/positioning so the sticky/floating button does not obstruct section headings.

verification_details.reserve_table_btn: present on / and /gallery, click navigates to #contact
verification_details.hero_layers: 5 slides, hero-layer-0 video active initially, clicking nav button 3 activates hero-layer-2 (South Indian)
verification_details.founder_cards: 3 cards rendered, premium size ~374x560 with image + overlay
verification_details.mobile_390x844: Reserve btn visible, founders row collapses to single column (324px)

action_items: (Low priority) Reposition or lower z-index of Reserve a Table floating button in Contact section so it doesn't overlap the 'Contact The Corporate Office' H2 on desktop.
critical_code_review_comments: App.jsx exceeds recommended size for a single-file React entry (Hero, MenuShowcase, Founders, ReserveTableButton, App export all inline); consider splitting into components/ modules for maintainability.

Menu filter comparison: only 'All' and 'Chef Special' exist and every fallback item has category 'Chef Special', so clicking 'Chef Special' yields identical result set to 'All' (23 items in both). Functional, but the filter provides no differentiation — either seed non-Chef-Special items or hide the chef-special filter to avoid dead UX.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend Phase 2 acceptance-tested. Focus areas fully verified. Only cosmetic issue: floating Reserve button overlaps Contact heading on desktop. Backend was intentionally skipped.
